checked_dimensions.evidence: specbridge.ps1 change is minimal: one ErrorActionPreference guard around gh call and idempotent already-closed check. No product logic changed. No secrets, production, billing, auth, database, dependency, CI/CD security, or deployment files changed.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files limited to declared scope paths. No protected paths touched. specbridge.ps1 change only affects error handling for already-closed issue case.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately records local completion pending PR CI without claiming post-merge facts.

findings.evidence: PR, CI, and merge for issue 121 are pending external GitHub gates.
findings.recommendation: Open the PR, wait for required checks, and merge only if policy gates pass.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 121 branch.
